reviews.review_description: This is the first mixed reality game that I’m paying cash for, and I’m so glad I did. It’s exactly what I needed when I’m just looking for fun￼. Sometimes I need nothing complex ,￼ no confusing moving parts or flashing lights. ￼ I just wanna sit down and play! ￼ This game is perfect for that.

Reminds me of Angry Birds Space from back in the day.  It has some gravitational pull when close to planets that changes your trajectory slightly.  Fun and chill game for short sessions between shooting zombies 🧟‍♀️
What a great game.  Very challenging but yet fun.
